webdev.subtitle: fast and affordable
webdev.intro: We build modern, responsive websites that help businesses establish a strong online presence. From single-page landing sites to multi-page corporate websites, we deliver quality solutions at competitive prices.

features.title: Custom Solutions
features.description: Every website is unique and tailored to your specific business needs.

features.title: Modern, Responsive Design
features.description: Websites that look great on all devices — from mobile phones to desktop computers.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.description: From concept to live website in no time, without unnecessary delays.

features.title: SEO Optimization
features.description: Built-in search engine optimization so your clients can find you easily.

features.title: Affordable Pricing
features.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs. You know exactly what you're getting.

features.title: Maintenance & Support
features.description: Ongoing support and updates after your website goes live.

packages.name: Starter
packages.description: Single-page or presentation site up to 5 pages

packages.name: Business
packages.description: Multi-page business website up to 15 pages

items.heading: Websites for Restaurants & Hospitality
items.description: Restaurants, cafés, bars — attract guests with a modern online presence featuring menus, galleries, and contact info.

items.heading: Websites for Apartments & Accommodation
items.description: Increase direct bookings and reduce dependence on booking platforms.

items.heading: Websites for Tradespeople & Craftsmen
items.description: Showcase your services, portfolio, and contact details — without unnecessary complexity.

items.heading: Websites for Small Businesses
items.description: A professional online presence that builds trust with new clients.

items.heading: Websites for Tourism & Travel Agencies
items.description: Reach more clients with an attractive site showcasing your destinations and packages.

items.heading: Websites for Salons & Beauty Professionals
items.description: Present your services, portfolio gallery, and contact options — all in one place.

ugostiteljstvo.subtitle: Attract more guests and increase bookings
ugostiteljstvo.intro: Your restaurant, café, or bar deserves an online presence that reflects the atmosphere and quality of your venue. A modern website isn't just a business card — it's a sales tool that works 24/7. Guests increasingly look up menus, opening hours, and reviews online before visiting — be there when they search.
bullets: Digital menu with food and drink photos
Gallery of your venue and ambiance
Opening hours, location and Google Maps integration
Contact form and direct reservation link

cta.title: Let's launch your website
cta.description: Tell us about your venue and let's work out the details.

apartmani.subtitle: More direct bookings, fewer commissions
apartmani.intro: Every booking through Booking.com or Airbnb costs you 15–20% in commission. Your own website lets you attract guests directly — and keep that money for yourself. With the right SEO optimization, guests can find you on Google and book without intermediaries.
bullets: Contact form and WhatsApp integration for quick inquiries
Google Maps and directions to your accommodation

cta.title: Reduce commissions, increase earnings
cta.description: Let's build a website that brings you direct bookings.

obrtnici.subtitle: New clients find you online — be there
obrtnici.intro: Most new clients today search for a plumber, electrician, carpenter, or painter on Google. Without a website, you're missing those inquiries. A simple, professional site with your services, contact details, and portfolio is enough to stand out from the competition.
bullets: Overview of the services you offer
SEO optimization for local searches (e.g. 'plumber Split')
Fast turnaround — live within a week

cta.title: Let's get you online
cta.description: A fast, affordable website tailored to your trade.

male-tvrtke.subtitle: Professional online presence without big costs
male-tvrtke.intro: For a small business, a website is the cheapest and most effective marketing tool available. Potential clients check your online profile before they call — a professional site builds trust and increases the chances they'll choose you.
bullets: SEO optimization for your industry and location
Blog or news section for regular updates

cta.title: Let's build your online identity
cta.description: Tell us about your business and what you want to achieve.

turizam.subtitle: Reach more travelers with an attractive online presence
turizam.intro: Tourists plan their trips online — and your agency or tourism offering needs to be visible where they search. A modern website with attractive photos, destination descriptions, and a clear call to action converts visitors into clients.

cta.title: Attract more travelers
cta.description: Let's build a website that showcases the beauty of your offer.

saloni.subtitle: Showcase your work and attract new clients
saloni.intro: Clients choose a salon based on photos of work, reviews, and location — and they look for all of this online. A website that showcases your services and portfolio in a professional way brings you new clients without expensive advertising.
bullets: Online contact or appointment inquiry form
Links to Instagram and social media

cta.title: Show your work to the world
cta.description: Let's build a site that reflects your style and attracts the right clients.

cta.title: Ready to build your website?
cta.description: Let's discuss your project and find the perfect solution for your business.

fullstack.subtitle: End-to-end solutions from database to UI
fullstack.intro: We deliver complete software solutions using modern technologies. Whether you need a robust backend system, an interactive frontend, or a full-stack application, we handle every layer of the stack with expertise.
